title: celsia scrophulariifolia var. foliosa
intro: Celsia scrophulariifolia var. foliosa, commonly known as the 'leafy celsia', is a perennial flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its leaves, roots, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Celsia scrophulariifolia var. foliosa include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health conditions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
